headline: Cisco Is Up 61% in 2026. It’s One of 3 Dividend Stocks Quietly Riding the AI Boom.
summary: These three companies surged in 2026, proving that some of the market's strongest dividend stocks are growth names quietly riding the AI and data infrastructure boom.

headline: Analog Devices Inc (NASDAQ:ADI): A Compelling Affordable Growth Opportunity
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) fits an affordable growth strategy with a strong 8/10 growth rating, reasonable valuation, and high profitability, making it a compelling GARP candidate for balanced portfolios.

headline: Lam Research: The Etch Monopoly Printing Record Margins While The Street Debates Peak Cycle
summary: Lam Research's leadership in etch and deposition equipment and AI-driven chip complexity trends provide structural tailwinds. See why LRCX stock a Buy.
